videos.headline: Nick Nash scores a TD for San Jose State
videos.description: Nick Nash scores a touchdown to give San Jose State a 7-3 lead vs. Oregon State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nick Nash scores a TD for San Jose State) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Anthony Hankerson scores a TD for Oregon State
videos.description: Anthony Hankerson scores a 10-yard touchdown to even the game 10-10 vs. San Jose State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Anthony Hankerson scores a TD for Oregon State) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: San Jose State blocks field goal right before halftime
videos.description: San Jose State blocks a field goal from Oregon State kicker Kyler Halvorsen heading into halftime with the score tied 10-10.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (San Jose State blocks field goal right before halftime) 2024/11/09 ESHEET
